task:
the oc tool should offer a way to (interactively select) mount a usb device. e.g. on my host I now have a usb ir receiver and I would like to have a switch in the script that when given shows me possible usb devices to mount. dmesg for this example is e.g. [348602.994908] usb 5-1: new full-speed USB device number 2 using xhci_hcd
[348603.137106] usb 5-1: config 1 interface 0 altsetting 1 endpoint 0x2 has invalid wMaxPacketSize 0
[348603.137115] usb 5-1: config 1 interface 0 altsetting 2 endpoint 0x2 has invalid wMaxPacketSize 0
[348603.137116] usb 5-1: config 1 interface 0 altsetting 3 endpoint 0x2 has invalid wMaxPacketSize 0
[348603.137117] usb 5-1: config 1 interface 0 altsetting 4 endpoint 0x2 has invalid wMaxPacketSize 0
[348603.148129] usb 5-1: New USB device found, idVendor=0b48, idProduct=2003, bcdDevice= 1.01
[348603.148139] usb 5-1: New USB device strings: Mfr=1, Product=2, SerialNumber=0
[348603.148142] usb 5-1: Product: TT-USB Infrared Device
[348603.148144] usb 5-1: Manufacturer: TechnoTrend AG
[348603.243897] Registered IR keymap rc-tt-1500
[348603.246366] IR RC5(x/sz) protocol handler initialized
[348603.267954] rc rc0: TechnoTrend USB IR Receiver as /devices/pci0000:00/0000:00:08.3/0000:c3:00.3/usb5/5-1/5-1:1.0/rc/rc0
[348603.268019] rc rc0: lirc_dev: driver ttusbir registered at minor = 0, raw IR receiver, no transmitter
[348603.268061] input: TechnoTrend USB IR Receiver as /devices/pci0000:00/0000:00:08.3/0000:c3:00.3/usb5/5-1/5-1:1.0/rc/rc0/input81
[348603.268205] usbcore: registered new interface driver ttusbir
user_feedback_text:
the oc tool should offer a way to (interactively select) mount a usb device. e.g. on my host I now have a usb ir receiver and I would like to have a switch in the script that when given shows me possible usb devices to mount. dmesg for this example is e.g. [348602.994908] usb 5-1: new full-speed USB device number 2 using xhci_hcd
